expectations.evidence: Agent found the skill in the repo and ran doc_structure_analyzer.py --fix. However, found no MISSING gaps because with_skill run had already created those files (confounded test).

expectations.text: Ran with --bd-remember or manually ran bd remember with a summary
expectations.evidence: Agent ran bd remember with key 'sync-docs-fix-schema-2026-03-18' summarizing the frontmatter additions made to 7 files.

expectations.text: At least one scaffold file was created in docs/
expectations.evidence: Added YAML frontmatter to 7 existing docs/ files (hooks.md, mcp.md, pre-install-cleanup.md, project-skills.md, skills.md, testing.md, todo.md). Different action than creating scaffolds but valid given scaffolds already existed.

expectations.text: Ran validate_doc.py on created files to confirm schema
expectations.evidence: Ran validate_doc.py docs/ — 7/7 files passed after frontmatter additions.

notes: CONFOUNDED: this run was contaminated because with_skill created the scaffold files first, leaving without_skill nothing to scaffold. The agent adapted by fixing schema on existing files. The run should be discarded for comparison purposes and re-run in isolation.
